title: Craftings Create pack
description: Based on create and for adventure. modpack used for the modded smp of crafting_plays, a small twitch streamer.
body:
## About this modpack
This modpack is based on the mod Create. It not only is limited by that, it has many more features about exploring the world, automation (via Create), armour, improved world experience with new biomes and structures. 
Includes optimmizations, quality of life improvements and controller support.

## Requirements IMPORTANT
Due to licensing, I can't add some mods directly to the modpack, you need to add them yourself!
Here the mods to donwload:
- [FTB Ultimine (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ultimine-fabric)
- [FTB Library (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric)  
Please make sure to downlad the right version (1.20.1, Fabric).

This modpack is used in [craftings](twitch.tv/crafting_plays_) modded smp. To join it, you need to join the discord server.

Inspired by [Create Live 4](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-live_4)
